actionCalls.name: myRule_1_A1
actionCalls.label: Notify Requester, Creator and RFP Team

actionCalls.name: myRule_5_A1
actionCalls.label: Notify Requester, creator and MI Team

Flow.description: Notify participants when the status is changed to closed or completed

value.stringValue: AND(CONTAINS([Case].RecordType.Name, "Product"), ISCHANGED([Case].Status), OR(ISPICKVAL([Case].Status , "Completed"), ISPICKVAL([Case].Status , "Awaiting Client's Feedback")), !$User.BypassProcessBuilders__c)

Flow.label: WorkTogether_PB010_Closed
